ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 15th April

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear {{User}},

We have detected suspicious activity in your crypto wallet. Due to new regulatory requirements, your wallet has been temporarily suspended.

To restore access and prevent permanent freezing of your funds, please verify your identity by clicking <URL> and logging in within the next 24 hours.

Failure to act will result in permanent loss of funds. This is a mandatory security measure. If you have any questions, contact our support team immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
CryptoSecure Support Team
